description.content: Create a programmable non-custodial wallet. Requires a User Action Signature.
List wallets.
Get a wallet by id.
Get a wallet's asset balances.
Get a wallet's NFTs.
Get a wallet's on-chain history.
Transfer a native, token, or NFT asset from a wallet. Requires a User Action Signature.
List transfer requests for a wallet.
Get a transfer request by id.
Sign and broadcast a caller-supplied transaction from a wallet. Requires a User Action Signature.
List transaction requests for a wallet.
Get a transaction request by id.
Create a standalone MPC key. Requires a User Action Signature.
List keys.
Get a key by id.
Delegate a key to an end user for non-custodial delegated signing. Requires a User Action Signature.
Generate a raw signature from a key. Requires a User Action Signature.
List signature requests for a key.
Get a signature request by id.
Create a policy. Requires a User Action Signature.
List policies.
Get a policy by id.
Update a policy. Requires a User Action Signature.
Archive (delete) a policy. Requires a User Action Signature.
List approvals.
Get an approval by id.
Approve or deny a pending approval. Requires a User Action Signature.
Register an HTTPS webhook. Requires a User Action Signature.
List webhooks.
Get a webhook by id.
Send a test event to a webhook.
List the event delivery log for a webhook.
Create a permission. Requires a User Action Signature.
List permissions.
Get a permission by id.
Assign a permission to an identity. Requires a User Action Signature.
Initialize a User Action Signing challenge.
Complete a User Action Signing challenge and return the X-DFNS-USERACTION value.
Exchange signed login credentials for an access token.
Obtain a scoped access token on behalf of an end user. Requires a User Action Signature.
List users.
Create a user. Requires a User Action Signature.
List service accounts.
Create a service account. Requires a User Action Signature.
Get a service account by id.
Activate a service account. Requires a User Action Signature.
Deactivate a service account. Requires a User Action Signature.
Estimate current network fees.
Perform a read-only smart contract function call.

Dfns wallet-as-a-service and MPC key-management REST API. Base URL https://api.dfns.io. Authenticate with a Bearer access token (Authorization header) and X-DFNS-APPID; sensitive mutations additionally require an X-DFNS-USERACTION User Action Signature.
